client_request: Deliver a working authentication workflow using the current public Acme Identity API.

agents.responsibility: Verify current API documentation, define the architecture, and document assumptions.
Implement the plan, note any incompatibilities, and provide a public deliverable URL.

expected_demo_reading.root_cause: Planning selected a deprecated API version without verifying current documentation.
expected_demo_reading.contributing_cause: Coding followed the flawed plan but did not flag missing required fields during implementation.
